queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of negative checking account balances on increased credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Statistical investigation into the association between savings balances below 100 DM and reduced credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Credit risk determinants related to the absence of a checking account and its contribution to increased loan default.
